title: sideroxylon pentagonum
intro: Sideroxylon pentagonum, also known as the Five-angled Boxwood or Pentagonal Sideroxylon, is a plant species belonging to the family Sapotaceae. The medicinal properties of Sideroxylon pentagonum lie in its leaves, which are traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. Sideroxylon pentagonum can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy in traditional medicine.
